PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: finalized the canonical installer provenance stamp and made --version print the exact release tag (v0.19.2)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: rolled the canonical repo-bootstrap plugin installer across the marketplace and dropped Windows

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: reworked the judge for model-free verdict identity, canonical keys, and a retrieval suggester (v9)

captain-hook@v8.5.1.summary: tightened nudge precision — pin-faithful headers and relay-aware prose rubrics

cc-pool@v0.44.0.summary: shipped a trustworthy File Provider end to end — app-side probe, parked breaker, transactional convert

slop-cop@v0.1.32.summary: dropped Windows support and re-stamped the canonical installer
